info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes progress moves fast like the tango, or slow like a waltz.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Let's see if we can synchronize our steps a bit.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Let's see if we can synchronize our steps a bit, that way progress will operate smoothly.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Don't stand and watch me, join in!

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Don't stand and watch me, join in because progress is more fun when others get involved.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you have a partner during your progress, you may have more fun dancing your way to success.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress can be a slow, solo journey like dancing with yourself, but it's still progress.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Dance like no one is watching, so progress like it only matters to you.
